settings.heading: The Gentle Way Australians Are Whitening Their Teeth at Home

settings.text: Coffee, tea and red wine stain your enamel, and brushing will not shift it. The usual fixes have downsides. Harsh strips can sting, and in-chair whitening starts at $600 or more. The Elaren routine changes the maths. A Purple Mouthwash for instant brightness, enamel-safe Whitening Strips for deeper results, and a hands-free LED Device. Alcohol-free and gentle on your enamel.
settings.highlighted_texts: Alcohol-free and gentle on your enamel.

settings.content:
If you drink coffee or tea, your enamel picks up stains that brushing will not shift. The usual fixes have real downsides. Harsh strips can sting for days, in-chair whitening starts around $600 a session, and many kits make you sit still.

Elaren takes a different approach. A hands-free LED device that brightens your whole smile at once, a Purple Mouthwash for instant brightness, and enamel-safe strips for deeper results.

Harsh whitening agents work fast, but that speed is exactly why some strips sting and why sensitive teeth flare up for days afterwards. In-chair whitening uses stronger formulas again, which is why the $600 session often comes with a sensitivity warning.

If you have quit a whitening kit halfway through, that stinging feeling is probably why.

1. Rinse. Swish the Purple Mouthwash for about 30 seconds for instant brightness.

2. Strip. Apply the enamel-safe Whitening Strips for about 30 minutes for deeper results.

3. Accelerate. Run the hands-free LED Device while you get on with your day.

No trays to hold, no sitting still. Each step is short enough to disappear into the time you already spend getting ready.
settings.highlighted_texts: Swish the Purple Mouthwash for about 30 seconds|Run the hands-free LED Device while you get on with your day

settings.heading: What to expect, week by week

settings.content:
Day 1: a visibly brighter look after the Purple Mouthwash. Day 3: a cleaner, smoother feel. Day 7: many people see clearer progress. Day 14: someone comments on it. Day 30: side-by-side photo proof.

That is the honest timeline. Gradual, not overnight. Individual results vary, which is why we suggest you photograph your own progress from Day 1.
settings.highlighted_texts: Day 7: many people see clearer progress.|Individual results vary

settings.content:
Purple sits opposite yellow on the colour wheel, so the Purple Mouthwash neutralises yellow tones the moment you rinse. That is the instant brightness. The enamel-safe Whitening Strips then do the deeper work over the following weeks.

Elaren is built to be gentle. The strips are enamel-safe and the mouthwash is alcohol-free, so the routine is comfortable enough for sensitive teeth. One honest caveat. Whitening only works on natural enamel, so it will not change veneers or crowns.
settings.highlighted_texts: comfortable enough for sensitive teeth|Whitening only works on natural enamel

settings.content:
Whitening is easy to doubt when you cannot measure it, so make it visible. Photograph your smile on Day 1, then take a new photo each week and compare.

It turns whitening from a guess into something you can see for yourself, and it is the basis of the guarantee below.
settings.highlighted_texts: take a new photo each week

settings.content:

settings.text:
Taking the step
